request.business_goal: Create a premium beauty poster that can become a product showcase video

visual_dna.materials: glass serum bottle, glowing skin, silk fabric

prompt_contract.positive_prompt: Premium commercial advertising image for Luminous Serum in cosmetic beauty. Business goal: Create a premium beauty poster that can become a product showcase video. Audience: young professional women. high-trust cosmetic advertising product hero foreground, model support frame, visible packaging, ad-safe layout Camera: 100mm macro product lens, slight low angle for confident commercial presence, hero subject centered with product clearly readable, shallow depth of field, crisp subject edges. Lighting: controlled studio reflections, clean white-gold rim light, warm neutral luxury, deep but clean commercial shadows, no muddy skin, controlled specular highlights on product and skin. Materials: glass serum bottle, glowing skin, silk fabric. preserve micro texture: pores, fabric weave, glass refraction, metal reflection. Ultra realistic, cinematic, premium editorial finish, high texture fidelity, sharp commercial details. leave clean negative space for final text rendered by frontend; only render brand text if explicitly provided and short Campaign context: offer: launch bundle
prompt_contract.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, muddy texture, plastic skin, over-smoothed face, distorted anatomy, warped hands, extra fingers, deformed product, wrong logo, unreadable text, misspelled typography, overexposed highlights, flat lighting, AI artifact, uncanny face, bad crop, product hidden, brand text hallucination

camera_grammar.angle: slight low angle for confident commercial presence
camera_grammar.framing: hero subject centered with product clearly readable
camera_grammar.depth_of_field: shallow depth of field, crisp subject edges
camera_grammar.motion_readiness: pose and subject placement can expand into video storyboard

lighting_logic.style: controlled studio reflections, clean white-gold rim light
lighting_logic.shadow_policy: deep but clean commercial shadows, no muddy skin
lighting_logic.highlight_policy: controlled specular highlights on product and skin

material_logic.primary_materials: glass serum bottle, glowing skin, silk fabric
material_logic.texture_fidelity: preserve micro texture: pores, fabric weave, glass refraction, metal reflection
material_logic.commercial_realism: no plastic skin, no warped hands, no unreadable packaging

composition_logic.layout: product hero foreground, model support frame, visible packaging, ad-safe layout
composition_logic.hierarchy: face/product first, benefit second, CTA-safe area third
composition_logic.negative_space: clean region reserved for final typography overlay
composition_logic.crop_safety: full product visible, no crop through hands/face/logo

typography_policy.instruction: leave clean negative space for final text rendered by frontend; only render brand text if explicitly provided and short
typography_policy.logo_policy: preserve product label if supplied as image/reference; otherwise avoid invented brand spelling
